title: [TUI] PTY parity checklist for tui-work
description: Umbrella subtask under tk-avhl. Run and record parity validation for scrollback, multiline composer, resize during streaming, picker/completer clearing, cancel flows, and terminal behavior in normal terminal plus tmux before merge.

logs.msg: PTY/manual checklist is still blocked on unresolved multiline prompt-box bugs. Do not run merge-gate validation yet.

Still blocked on user PTY validation. Code-side prerequisites improved: stale inline rows are now explicitly cleared on reserve growth/resize and footer rendering is single-pass. Next step is manual native terminal + tmux verification.
